name: mini-qr
tagline: A minimalist web tool for generating and customizing QR codes
description: mini-qr is a minimalist web tool for generating and customizing QR codes in the browser. It supports various encoding modes and styles with a lightweight, self-hosted interface ideal for offline usage.

features.title: QR Code Generation
features.description: Generate QR codes for text and URLs

features.title: Web Interface
features.description: Create QR codes through a browser

features.title: Download Options
features.description: Download generated QR codes as images

features.title: Self-Hosted Tool
features.description: Run the generator on your own servers
